directions_tried.direction: Phase 0 definition gate for a tiny delayed trigger
directions_tried.notes: Exploration 001 showed that the trigger-focused framing does not produce a new exact object. The faithful exact trigger object collapses to the prior five-role singleton model, and the packet backup remains non-canonical.

explorations_completed.direction: Phase 0 definition gate for a tiny delayed trigger
explorations_completed.key_takeaway: The only faithful exact trigger object is the prior five-role helical hypergraph with `a3` highlighted, so the strategy has no new canonical test object beyond the already-killed singleton model.
